잠언 9:1.content: Wisdom has built her house. She has carved out her seven pillars.

잠언 9:2.content: She has prepared her meat. She has mixed her wine. She has also set her table.

잠언 9:3.content: She has sent out her maidens. She cries from the highest places of the city:

잠언 9:4.content: “Whoever is simple, let him turn in here!” As for him who is void of understanding, she says to him,

잠언 9:5.content: “Come, eat some of my bread, Drink some of the wine which I have mixed!

잠언 9:6.content: Leave your simple ways, and live. Walk in the way of understanding.”

잠언 9:7.content: One who corrects a mocker invites insult. One who reproves a wicked man invites abuse.

잠언 9:8.content: Don’t reprove a scoffer, lest he hate you. Reprove a wise person, and he will love you.

잠언 9:9.content: Instruct a wise person, and he will be still wiser. Teach a righteous person, and he will increase in learning.

잠언 9:10.content: The fear of Yahweh is the beginning of wisdom. The knowledge of the Holy One is understanding.

잠언 9:11.content: For by me your days will be multiplied. The years of your life will be increased.

잠언 9:12.content: If you are wise, you are wise for yourself. If you mock, you alone will bear it.

잠언 9:13.content: The foolish woman is loud, undisciplined, and knows nothing.

잠언 9:14.content: She sits at the door of her house, on a seat in the high places of the city,

잠언 9:15.content: to call to those who pass by, who go straight on their ways,

잠언 9:16.content: “Whoever is simple, let him turn in here.” as for him who is void of understanding, she says to him,

잠언 9:17.content: “Stolen water is sweet. Food eaten in secret is pleasant.”

잠언 9:18.content: But he doesn’t know that the departed spirits are there, that her guests are in the depths of Sheol.
